cities.name: Beijing
cities.description: The capital of China, blending ancient imperial heritage with modern innovation. Home to the Forbidden City and Great Wall.

cities.name: Shanghai
cities.description: China's largest city and global financial hub, where futuristic skyline meets colonial-era charm.

cities.name: Guangzhou
cities.description: Southern China's commercial powerhouse, famous for Cantonese cuisine and trade history.

cities.name: Shenzhen
cities.description: China's Silicon Valley - a tech megacity that transformed from a fishing village to a global innovation hub.

cities.name: Chengdu
cities.description: The laid-back capital of Sichuan, world-famous for giant pandas and fiery spicy cuisine.

cities.name: Hangzhou
cities.description: One of China's most beautiful cities, home to the legendary West Lake and tech giant Alibaba.

cities.name: Xi'an
cities.description: Ancient capital of 13 dynasties and starting point of the Silk Road. Home to the Terracotta Army.

cities.name: Suzhou
cities.description: The 'Venice of the East' - famous for classical gardens, silk, and canal-laced old town.

cities.name: Guilin
cities.description: Iconic karst landscape - 'East or West, Guilin's scenery is best'. Famous for Li River cruises.

cities.name: Lijiang
cities.description: UNESCO-listed ancient town with cobblestone streets, Naxi culture, and snow-capped mountain views.

cities.name: Kunming
cities.description: The 'City of Eternal Spring' - mild climate year-round with diverse ethnic culture.

cities.name: Dali
cities.description: Ancient Bai culture city by Erhai Lake with three pagodas and breathtaking mountain scenery.

cities.name: Chongqing
cities.description: The world's largest municipality - a 3D mountain city famous for hotpot and Yangtze River cruises.

cities.name: Wuhan
cities.description: Strategic central city at the confluence of Yangtze and Han Rivers. Famous for cherry blossoms.

cities.name: Nanjing
cities.description: Ancient capital of six dynasties, blending history with modern energy. Famous for autumn ginkgo.

cities.name: Qingdao
cities.description: Coastal city with German colonial architecture, beautiful beaches, and the famous Tsingtao Beer.

cities.name: Xiamen
cities.description: Picturesque coastal garden city with Gulangyu Island - a UNESCO World Heritage site.

cities.name: Sanya
cities.description: Tropical paradise of China - pristine beaches, palm trees, and resort luxury.

cities.name: Harbin
cities.description: Ice City of the North - famous for the spectacular Ice and Snow Festival and Russian architecture.

cities.name: Lhasa
cities.description: The sacred 'Sun City' high on the Tibetan Plateau, spiritual heart of Tibetan Buddhism.

cities.name: Urumqi
cities.description: Capital of Xinjiang at the heart of Central Asia - vibrant bazaars and multi-ethnic culture.

cities.name: Tianjin
cities.description: Northern port city with European-style architecture and famous breakfast street food.

cities.name: Dalian
cities.description: Coastal jewel of northeastern China with romantic seaside views and clean ocean breeze.

cities.name: Zhangjiajie
cities.description: Otherworldly sandstone pillars that inspired Avatar's Pandora floating mountains.

cities.name: Huangshan
cities.description: Yellow Mountain - sea of clouds, pine trees, and granite peaks. A painter's paradise.

cities.name: Pingyao
cities.description: Best-preserved ancient walled city in China - a living museum of Ming-Qing dynasty architecture.

cities.name: Shangri-La
cities.description: High-altitude Tibetan town named after the mythical paradise - prayer wheels and pristine meadows.

cities.name: Jiuzhaigou
cities.description: Crystal-clear turquoise lakes and waterfalls - one of China's most spectacular natural wonders.

cities.name: Macau
cities.description: East-meets-West fusion - Portuguese colonial charm and Asia's gambling capital.

cities.name: Hong Kong
cities.description: Asia's world city - dazzling skyline, dim sum, and a perfect blend of East and West.

cities.name: Tibet (Shigatse)
cities.description: Tibet's second city - home to Tashilhunpo Monastery and gateway to Mount Everest.

cities.name: Changsha
cities.description: Vibrant Hunan capital famous for spicy cuisine, Chairman Mao's hometown, and nightlife.

cities.name: Zhengzhou
cities.description: Cradle of Chinese civilization - gateway to Shaolin Temple and the Yellow River.

cities.name: Jinan
cities.description: 'City of Springs' - 72 famous springs and home to Mount Tai, China's most sacred mountain.

cities.name: Fuzhou
cities.description: Banyan tree city with rich Min cultural heritage and gateway to Wuyi Mountain tea region.

cities.name: Hefei
cities.description: Anhui's capital - rising tech hub with deep historical roots dating back to the Three Kingdoms.

cities.name: Nanchang
cities.description: Birthplace of the People's Liberation Army with the famous Tengwang Pavilion overlooking the Gan River.

cities.name: Taiyuan
cities.description: Ancient capital of Shanxi province - 2500 years of history and famous for vinegar and noodles.

cities.name: Hohhot
cities.description: 'Blue City' of Inner Mongolia - gateway to vast grasslands and Mongolian nomadic culture.

cities.name: Yinchuan
cities.description: Capital of Ningxia - desert oasis blending Hui Muslim culture with Western Xia kingdom history.

cities.name: Lanzhou
cities.description: City on the Yellow River - famous for hand-pulled beef noodles and Silk Road heritage.

cities.name: Xining
cities.description: Gateway to the Tibetan Plateau and Qinghai Lake - China's largest saltwater lake.

cities.name: Guiyang
cities.description: Capital of Guizhou - cool summer climate, big data hub, and gateway to ethnic minority villages.

cities.name: Haikou
cities.description: Capital of Hainan Island - tropical coastal city with palm-lined streets and free trade zone.

cities.name: Shijiazhuang
cities.description: Capital of Hebei province - revolutionary history and gateway to Mount Cangyan.
